request.description: Creates a new vehicle in the system. The plate must be unique — a duplicate plate returns 409 Conflict.
Returns all registered vehicles. Supports optional filtering by `color` and `brand` as query parameters (case-insensitive partial match).
Returns a single vehicle by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if the vehicle does not exist.
Partially updates a vehicle. All fields (plate, color, brand) are optional. Updating to a plate already in use by another vehicle returns 409 Conflict.
Removes a vehicle from the system by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if the vehicle does not exist.
Creates a new driver in the system. Only the `name` field is required.
Returns all registered drivers. Supports optional filtering by `name` as a query parameter (case-insensitive partial match).
Returns a single driver by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if the driver does not exist.
Partially updates a driver. Only the `name` field is supported.
Removes a driver from the system by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if the driver does not exist.

Creates a vehicle usage record, assigning a driver to a vehicle with a start date and reason. Business rules: a vehicle can only be in use by one driver at a time (409 Conflict), and a driver cannot use more than one vehicle at a time (409 Conflict).

response.body:
{
    "name": "Conflict",
    "message": "Vehicle with id 15d99105-2174-4b34-acb1-c356eff34b8c is already in use",
    "errorCode": "VEHICLE_ALREADY_IN_USE",
    "statusCode": 409,
    "timestamp": "2026-03-22T16:37:52.971Z"
}

request.description: Returns all vehicle usage records, including driver and vehicle information.
Marks an active vehicle usage as finished by setting the end date to the current timestamp. Returns 422 if the usage has already been finished.

response.body:
{
    "name": "UnprocessableContent",
    "message": "Vehicle usage with id 705a7b24-7612-4bd7-9e39-e58938712825 is already finished",
    "errorCode": "VEHICLE_USAGE_ALREADY_FINISHED",
    "statusCode": 422,
    "timestamp": "2026-03-22T16:38:50.176Z"
}
